General.Name: Orion Digital Corp.
General.Description: Orion Digital Corp., a financial technology company, operates digital platforms for wealth and payments in Canada and Europe. The company offers Intelligent Investing, a wealth platform which provides long-term investing solutions; and issuer processing, program management, and regulated payment orchestration services. It also engages in the consumer lending business. The company was formerly known as Mogo Inc. and changed its name to Orion Digital Corp. in December 2025. Orion Digital Corp. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
General.Address: Park Place, 666 Burrard Street, Vancouver, BC, Canada, V6C 2X8
